agents.name: Backlog Manager Agent
agents.description: Manages the product backlog and initiates workflow for backlog items by creating GitHub issues and coordinating the feature development workflow.

agents.name: Feature Branch Coordinator Agent
agents.description: Creates and manages feature branches following the development workflow, coordinates branch creation from issues, and prepares the repository state for feature development.

agents.name: Test Scenario Designer Agent
agents.description: Creates comprehensive manual testing scenarios and e2e test specifications based on feature requirements, ensuring quality validation before and after implementation.

agents.name: Feature Developer Agent
agents.description: Implements feature code following approved test scenarios, writes production-ready code with tests, and maintains code quality standards throughout development.

agents.name: Deployment Orchestrator Agent
agents.description: Manages deployment of features to testing environment, orchestrates deployment pipelines, and ensures proper environment configuration.

agents.name: E2E Test Runner Agent
agents.description: Executes end-to-end tests in the testing environment, reports results, and manages test failure workflows.

agents.name: Code Review Expert Agent
agents.description: Conducts thorough code reviews focusing on quality, maintainability, security, and performance; provides constructive feedback aligned with development standards.

agents.name: Workflow Manager Agent
agents.description: Orchestrates the entire backlog-to-production workflow, monitors progress, coordinates between agents, and ensures smooth transitions between workflow steps.

agents.name: Development Methodology Expert Agent
agents.description: Provides expertise on software development best practices, workflow optimization, and process improvements.

agents.name: AI Development Advisor Agent
agents.description: Provides expertise on AI/ML integration, LLM usage, prompt engineering, and AI-powered development practices.

steps: Step 3-4: Create manual testing scenarios (Test Scenario Designer + User Review)
Step 5: Implement the feature (Feature Developer with Code Review Expert feedback)
Step 6: Deploy to testing environment (Deployment Orchestrator)
Step 7-8: Run e2e tests (E2E Test Runner)
Step 8a: If tests fail, create issue (E2E Test Runner)
supporting_agents: AI Development Advisor Agent (advises on AI integration)
